div.h1: Pipeline Data Flow: cmd1 | cmd2 | cmd3

ol.li: pipe[1] read end count drops to 0.

ul.li: Parallelism: Processes run on separate CPU cores.
Blocking: Producer sleeps if buffer is full; Consumer sleeps if buffer is empty.

div.p: Pipe Buffer [0] Circular Ring Buffer Size: 64 KB
Pipe Buffer [1] Circular Ring Buffer Size: 64 KB
